title: NSIC – Young Professional – 17 Posts
applyMode: Online only via NSIC Career section: www.nsic.co.in
shortInfo: NSIC Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 17 vacancies for Young Professional posts. Candidates can apply online only from 23.05.2026 to 08.06.2026 through NSIC website nsic.co.in.

basic_details.job_title: NSIC Young Professional Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 17 Posts
basic_details.short_information: NSIC Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 17 vacancies for Young Professional posts. Candidates can apply online only from 23.05.2026 to 08.06.2026 through NSIC website nsic.co.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Human Resources, NSIC Corporate Office / Subsidiaries
basic_details.application_mode: Online only via NSIC Career section: www.nsic.co.in

age_limit.age_details: Bachelor's degree in Mass Communication / Digital Media / Journalism / Public Relations. MBA is an added advantage.

qualification.education_qualification: 08-06-2026 (qualifications and experience must be acquired on or before this date)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on application + Interaction / Interview by Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online through the CAREER section of www.nsic.co.in only. No other mode of application will be accepted. The online application link is active from 23-05-2026. The application process is in 3 stages. Candidates should keep all documents ready before starting the application as incomplete applications cannot be modified after submission.
seo_tags: National Small Industries Corporation Young Professional Recruitment 2026
